QEMU drivers and utilities for accelerometer, battery, serial communication, settings, and touch sensor.


## Files
- **[qemu_accel.c](qemu_accel.c.md)**: QEMU accelerometer driver with sample buffering and playback at configurable rates.
- **[qemu_accel.h](qemu_accel.h.md)**: Initializes QEMU acceleration and handles QemuProtocol_Accel messages over the serial connection.
- **[qemu_battery.c](qemu_battery.c.md)**: Simulates battery behavior in a QEMU environment, including charge status and USB connection handling.
- **[qemu_battery.h](qemu_battery.h.md)**: Defines a handler for processing QemuProtocol_Battery messages over a QEMU serial connection.
- **[qemu_serial.c](qemu_serial.c.md)**: Handles QEMU serial communication, including message processing and UART interrupt handling.
- **[qemu_serial.h](qemu_serial.h.md)**: Defines QEMU protocol structures and functions for serial communication in Pebble firmware.
- **[qemu_serial_private.h](qemu_serial_private.h.md)**: Defines data structures, constants, and functions for handling QEMU serial communication in firmware.
- **[qemu_serial_util.c](qemu_serial_util.c.md)**: Utilities for initializing and assembling messages in a QEMU serial communication context.
- **[qemu_settings.c](qemu_settings.c.md)**: Functions for reading QEMU-specific settings from RTC backup registers in a Pebble firmware context.
- **[qemu_settings.h](qemu_settings.h.md)**: Defines QemuSetting enum and a function to get QEMU settings in the pebble-firmware.
- **[qemu_touch.c](qemu_touch.c.md)**: Initializes the touch sensor for the QEMU environment in the Pebble firmware.
